title: Employment Credential
description: Verifiable credential attesting that a person holds (or held) a position at an organization.

employer.description: Legal name of the employing organization.

position.description: Job title or role held by the employee.

startDate.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) on which the employment began.

endDate.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) on which the employment ended. Omit if employment is current.
